hero.hero_strength: Main The basis of this hero is to deal high damage to one or more targets, burst damage to thin targets (mainly mages and marksmen). High mobility allows you to quickly get away from the enemy, as well as reduce the distance with him.
hero.hero_weakness: The weakness of the hero can be noticed by a difficult start and slow farming of the jungle, which can often affect the main gameplay. With a lack of farm, the hero will sag in damage and with a small amount of farm, he will not kill thin targets and be a very easy target for initiators/roamers. The hero is also in demand for personal experience of the game, since without personal experience he is still an easy target.

hero.hero_overview:
Hero Overview: Gusion (MLBB)

Gusion is a high-skill assassin hero who deals magic burst damage using fast dagger combos. He excels at quickly eliminating squishy heroes like marksmen and mages and escaping fights with high mobility. Gusion is strongest in the early to mid game and requires fast hands, accurate combos, and good map awareness to be effective.

Recommended Build (2026 META)

Arcane Boots
Starlium Scythe
Genius Wand
Holy Crystal
Divine Glaive
Blood Wings

Alternative / Situational Items

Lightning Truncheon
Winter Truncheon
Concentrated Energy

Best Emblem

Assassin Emblem
Rupture
Weapons Master
Lethal Ignition

Battle Spell

Retribution (for Jungle)
Flicker or Execute (for Mid Lane)
hero.hero_strength:
Gusion Strengths (MLBB)

1. Extremely high burst damage can eliminate squishy heroes very quickly.
2. Very fast skill combo skilled players can deal damage in seconds.
3. High mobility Skill 1 (Sword Spike) and Ultimate allow fast repositioning.
4. Strong early to mid game can snowball if he gets early kills.
5. Good pick-off ability great at targeting backline heroes like marksmen and mages.
6. Short skill cooldown reset Ultimate refreshes skills allowing double combos.
7. Hard to catch mobility and quick dashes make him difficult to lock down.
hero.hero_weakness:
Gusion Game Weakness Heroes:
-Saber
-Kaja
-Franco
-Eudora
-Barats

spell.spell_desc:
Why I Use Retribution for Gusion

I use Retribution for Gusion because it allows him to play as a jungle assassin. Retribution helps him clear jungle monsters much faster, which lets him level up and get gold earlier than enemies. This early advantage helps Gusion unlock his combo quickly and start ganking lanes to secure kills. Retribution also helps secure important objectives like the Turtle and Lord, which are important for winning the game.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Gusion works very well with heroes that have strong crowd control and engage potential. Allies that can stun slow or lock enemies in place make it easier for Gusion to land his full combo and secure kills. He also synergizes well with heroes that provide vision control and initiation because it allows safe and clean executions. Tanky frontliners and initiators help absorb damage and attention so Gusion can freely dive the backline. Supports with healing shields or protection also improve his survivability during aggressive plays. Overall Gusion performs best with teammates who can create openings control fights and protect him after execution.

counters.counter_desc: Gusion is weak against heroes with heavy crowd control burst damage and strong durability. Enemies that can stun silence or suppress him can easily stop his combo and kill him quickly. Tanky heroes with high magic defense reduce his burst impact and make executions harder. Heroes with strong sustain shields and healing can survive his combo and turn fights around. Vision control and good positioning from enemies also make it difficult for Gusion to find clean engages. Against these matchups Gusion must play patiently look for isolated targets and avoid forced team fights.

Gusion is weak against heroes with heavy crowd control burst damage and strong durability. Enemies that can stun silence or suppress him can easily stop his combo and kill him quickly. Tanky heroes with high magic defense reduce his burst impact and make executions harder. Heroes with strong sustain shields and healing can survive his combo and turn fights around. Vision control and good positioning from enemies also make it difficult for Gusion to find clean engages. Against these matchups Gusion must play patiently look for isolated targets and avoid forced team fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Gusion is strongest during the early game where he can pressure mid lane and control the map. Focus on fast wave clear and quick rotations to side lanes. Always look for opportunities to gank gold lane and exp lane after clearing mid. Play aggressively but smart by targeting squishy heroes and avoiding unnecessary fights with tanks. Use vision control and bush positioning to surprise enemies. In team situations wait for enemies to use their crowd control before engaging. Prioritize pick offs instead of full team fights. This phase is all about snowballing building momentum and creating pressure across the map through kills and rotations.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Explanation
This emblem set is chosen to maximize Gusion burst damage mobility and kill potential. Agility helps improve movement speed which is important for fast rotations roaming and positioning in fights. Invasion increases magic penetration allowing Gusion to deal higher damage especially to squishy targets in the early to mid game. Lethal Ignition perfectly fits Gusion combo playstyle by adding extra burst damage after landing skills making executions faster and more reliable. This emblem setup supports aggressive gameplay strong roaming pressure and efficient snowball potential from mid lane. It helps Gusion secure kills quickly dominate skirmishes and control the tempo of the game.

equips.equip_desc: This build is designed to maximize Gusion burst damage mobility and survivability. Arcane Boots provide early magic penetration which helps increase damage output in early fights. Genius Wand reduces enemy magic defense allowing Gusion to deal higher combo damage especially to squishy heroes. Holy Crystal greatly boosts magic power making his skills more lethal. Divine Glaive is important for breaking through magic defense of tanky heroes in mid to late game. Blood Wings provides massive magic power and extra survivability through shield effects. Winter Truncheon gives defensive utility allowing Gusion to survive dives and risky engages during team fights. This build supports fast executions strong roaming and reliable burst potential from mid lane.

hero.hero_overview: Gusion is a high-burst assassin mage who excels in fast executions and quick rotations from mid lane. He specializes in combo-based gameplay, using dagger skills and mobility to eliminate squishy targets instantly. As a mid laner, Gusion plays a crucial role in early map pressure, ganking side lanes, and snowballing the game through kills and tempo control. His playstyle rewards mechanical skill, map awareness, and precise timing.
hero.hero_strength:
Hero Strength
Gusion has high burst damage and can quickly eliminate marksmen mages and supports. He is very strong in early to mid game fights and skirmishes. His mobility allows fast engages and safe escapes. He has strong roaming potential and is very effective in ganking side lanes from mid lane. Once ahead he can control the flow of the game. He is very effective in picking off isolated enemies.
hero.hero_weakness:
Hero Weakness
Gusion requires high mechanical skill and good timing to be effective. He is very squishy and easy to kill if his combo fails. His effectiveness drops in late game team fights. Crowd control abilities can easily shut him down. His damage is combo dependent and missing skills greatly reduces his impact. His risky playstyle means mistakes are heavily punished.

data.recommend: I recommend that you should practice it before using in Rank mode.

spell.spell_desc: Petrify is chosen because it perfectly fits Gusion burst combo play style. The stun effect allows Gusion to secure his full combo without enemies escaping, making executions more consistent and reliable. It is very effective for locking down mobile heroes and preventing counterplay during dives. Petrify also helps in team fights by giving crowd control that Gusion normally lacks. It can be used to secure kills, escape dangerous situations, or control enemies during ganks. This spell greatly increases Gusion kill potential and combo success rate in both solo fights and team engagements.

data.title: Gusion Guide ( as my main hero)

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Gusion works best with crowd control heroes. Their stuns and setups make it easy for Gusion to land full combos and deal burst damage quickly.
Gusion pairs well with heroes that can poke or apply pressure. They help weaken enemies so Gusion can finish them with fast burst damage.

counters.counter_desc: Gusion is weak against heroes with heavy crowd control and instant burst. They can stop his combo and kill him before he escapes.

dominants.dominant_desc: Farm fast, reach level 4 early, and focus on ganking squishy heroes. Secure Turtle and avoid crowd control.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Why I chose this Emblem
This emblem helps Gusion farm faster, buy items early, and deal high burst damage to snowball the game.

equips.equip_desc:
Why I chose this build
This build focuses on one-shot burst damage. Arcane Boots and Genius Wand increase early magic penetration

hero.hero_overview: Gusion is a high-burst assassin who excels at fast jungle clear and quick eliminations. He relies on skill combos and mobility to enter fights, burst down squishy enemies, and escape safely. Best played as a jungler focusing on early ganks and snowballing the game.
hero.hero_strength:
Very high burst magic damage
Strong early mid game pressure
 Fast jungle clear and rotation
 Excellent mobility for chase and escape
 Can instantly delete marksman and mage
hero.hero_weakness:
Very squishy, dies fast if caught
Requires good combo timing and practice
 Weak against heavy crowd control
Falls off in late game if not ahead
High skill requirement, mistakes are punished

data.recommend: This guide is made to help players use Gusion effectively. Practice the combo timing, pick fights wisely, and you can dominate the early to mid game and do like

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is the best battle spell for Jungle Gusion because it helps him clear jungle faster and reach level 4 early. It allows Gusion to secure buffs, Turtle, and Lord easily. Faster farming lets Gusion rotate quickly, gank lanes early, and snowball the game. Use Retribution to steal objectives and gain advantage in early and mid game.

Holy Crystal
Huge Magic Power spike. This is where Gusion starts erasing heroes instantly, especially with Petrify + full combo.

Divine Glaive
Enemies start building Magic Defense mid game—Divine Glaive cuts through tanks and bruisers, keeping your burst relevant.

Blood Wings 
High Magic Power + shield = more survivability without sacrificing damage. Perfect for late-game dives.

Lightning Truncheon
Passive damage stays low, while items like Genius Wand + Holy Crystal directly amplify every dagger hit and secure kills.

hero.hero_overview: Born from the prestigious Paxley family, Gusion defied tradition by mastering both magic and blades. Where others choose one path, he chose speed—and perfection. With lightning-fast daggers and razor-sharp precision, Gusion dives into battle, eliminates his target in a blink, and vanishes before enemies can react.
hero.hero_strength:
Why Pick Gusion Mid?

Reach level 4 and you can 1 shot the backlines
More map control than sidelane
Can snowball teammates through rotations
Deadly against squishy comps
Note: Gusion mid shines best with good mechanics and map awareness
hero.hero_weakness:
Very Squishy
Highly Vulnerable To Crowd Control 
High Skill Requirements 
Weak When Skills On Cool down
Struggles vs Tankys Or Sustain Mids
Needs Team Support
But If Play Clean He Can Control The Pace Of The Game

spell.spell_desc:
No dodging, no flicker out. Petrify lets you hit 100% of your burst, especially on slippery mages and marksmen.
Once you unlock your ultimate, Petrify + combo = near-certain kill in mid lane or during rotations.
Petrify stuns nearby enemies, giving Gusion the guaranteed window he needs to land all his daggers.

hero.hero_overview: Gusion is a mid-lane Assassin hero in MLBB, known as the "Prince of the Magic Kingdom" with a backstory tied to mastering dual daggers for swift, lethal strikes. His core role is to eliminate high-priority targets (like carries or mages) with burst damage and mobility. In-game, he typically clears mid-lane minions quickly, then rotates to secure objectives (turtles, buffs) or gank side lanes to gain map control.
hero.hero_strength: - Advantages: High maneuverability, fast skill rotations, and strong snowball potential.
hero.hero_weakness: - Countered By: Heroes with strong CC (e.g., Aurora, Khufra) or sustained damage (e.g., Karrie, Claude) who can outlast or lock him down.

spell.spell_desc: 1. Early Game Farming: Use Retribution to finish off buffs (Red/Blue) and large jungle creeps to maximize gold/exp gain. Prioritize Red Buff first to boost your burst damage for ganks.
